mapper.select:
SELECT mp.*, sc.nick_name, sc.avatar_url, sc.country, sc.account, mt.template_name, sys.user_type FROM store_message_push_detail mp LEFT JOIN store_celebrity sc ON mp.kol_id = sc.id LEFT JOIN store_message_template mt on mp.message_tel_type = mt.id LEFT JOIN sys_user sys on mp.seller_id = sys.id where 1=1
and mp.seller_name like '%${detailsMerchantEmailModel.sellerName}%'
and sc.nick_name like '%${detailsMerchantEmailModel.kolName}%'
and mp.is_send = #{detailsMerchantEmailModel.isSend}
and mp.is_confirm = #{detailsMerchantEmailModel.isConfirm}
and mp.package_id is null
and mp.package_id is not null
and mp.send_email like '%${detailsMerchantEmailModel.sendEmail}%'
and mt.template_name like '%${detailsMerchantEmailModel.templateName}%'
and DATE_FORMAT(mp.email_push_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{detailsMerchantEmailModel.startSendTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(mp.email_push_date, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{detailsMerchantEmailModel.endSendTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
order by create_time desc

SELECT seller_id, seller_name, COUNT(is_send) as emailCount, SUM(if(is_send=1,1,0)) AS successCount, SUM(if(is_send=0,1,0)) AS waitCount , SUM(if(is_send=-1,1,0)) AS errorCount, SUM(if(is_confirm=1,1,0)) AS openCount, COUNT(DISTINCT kol_id) AS kolCount FROM store_message_push_detail
is_send != -2
and DATE_FORMAT(email_push_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{messagePushEmailCountModel.startEmailPushTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(email_push_date, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{messagePushEmailCountModel.endEmailPushTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and seller_name like '%${messagePushEmailCountModel.sellerName}%'
GROUP BY seller_id,seller_name
order by ${messagePushEmailCountModel.orderWord} ${messagePushEmailCountModel.order}
order by emailCount desc

select smp.kol_id, smp.kol_name, smp.kol_email, sc.tag, count(kol_id) as celebrityCount, SUM( IF(smp.is_confirm = 1, 1, 0)) AS openCount FROM store_message_push_detail smp LEFT JOIN store_celebrity sc on sc.id = smp.kol_id where is_send !=- 2
and smp.kol_email like '%${celebrityEmailStatisticsModel.kolEmail}%'
and smp.kol_name like '%${celebrityEmailStatisticsModel.kolName}%'
and DATE_FORMAT(email_push_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{celebrityEmailStatisticsModel.startEmailPushTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(email_push_date, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{celebrityEmailStatisticsModel.endEmailPushTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
GROUP BY kol_id,kol_name,kol_email,tag order by celebrityCount desc

SELECT seller_id, seller_name, count( seller_id ) AS sellerPushCount, sum(IF( is_confirm = 1, 1, 0 )) AS openCount FROM store_message_push_detail where kol_id = #{celebrityEmailStatisticsModel.kolId} and is_send !=- 2 GROUP BY seller_id,seller_name order by sellerPushCount desc

SELECT t.* FROM ( SELECT id, seller_id, seller_name, serial_code, item_amount, consume_type, item_name, pay_way, '' AS pay_status, STATUS, consume_date FROM store_seller_consume WHERE consume_type IN ( 0, 3, 4 ) ANd status = 0 AND pay_way != 2
UNION SELECT id, seller_id, seller_name, serial_code, recharge_amount AS item_amount, 7 AS consume_type, '充值', pay_way, pay_status, '' AS STATUS, create_time AS consume_date FROM store_seller_recharge WHERE pay_status = 1 UNION SELECT id, user_id AS seller_id, user_name AS seller_name, serial_code, cash_amount AS item_amount, 8 AS consume_type, '提现', account_type AS pay_way, '' AS pay_status, STATUS, create_time AS consume_date FROM store_cash_draws WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY consume_date DESC )t
and t.consume_type = #{financialStatisticsModel.consumeType}
and DATE_FORMAT(consume_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{financialStatisticsModel.startConsumeDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(consume_date, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{financialStatisticsModel.endConsumeDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and seller_name like '%${financialStatisticsModel.sellerName}%'
SELECT is_send, email_push_date, is_confirm FROM store_message_push_detail WHERE is_send !=- 2 AND is_send !=0

SELECT send_domain AS domain, count( send_domain ) AS count FROM store_message_push_detail WHERE email_push_date LIKE '%${format}' AND is_send !=- 2 GROUP BY send_domain HAVING count( send_domain ) > 0

SELECT kol_email, COUNT( id ) AS send_email_count FROM store_message_push_detail WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId} AND is_send != - 2
AND kol_email in
#{item}
GROUP BY kol_email
